title: Rich Mustardy Mediterranean Lentils Stew
description: A creamy, mustard-tinged lentil stew that pairs the earthy sweetness of green and red lentils with kombu-infused broth and Greek yogurt for a velvety finish. Ideal for a solo dinner that satisfies Mediterranean flavors with an Ayurvedic twist.
instructions: Rinse the green and red lentils under cold water until the water runs clear.
Heat the olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat and sauté the chopped onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced carrot and cook for an additional 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the tomato paste and kombu powder, cooking for 1 minute to bloom the flavors.
Add the lentils, vegetable broth, dried herb mix, salt, and pepper, then bring the mixture to a gentle boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the Dutch oven, and simmer until the lentils are tender, about 25 minutes.
In the last 10 minutes of cooking, stir in the lemon juice and add the Greek yogurt, whisking to incorporate fully.
Taste and adjust seasoning with extra salt or pepper if needed.
Serve the stew hot straight from the Dutch oven.
Enjoy a comforting, mustardy Mediterranean lentil stew that’s ready in under an hour.
